title: Turmeric brightening face oil
subtitle: An anhydrous face oil blending rosehip, jojoba, and turmeric-infused oil with vitamin E
excerpt: This anhydrous face oil combines rosehip oil, jojoba, and a turmeric-infused carrier oil. No water phase means no preservative is needed. Turmeric can leave a faint temporary stain on pale skin; this fades within minutes and does not transfer to fabric once absorbed. Best applied at night.
sourceNotes: Anhydrous facial oil blend. Rosehip oil (Rosa canina): high in linoleic acid, shelf life approximately 6 months; vitamin E extends this. Jojoba (Simmondsia chinensis): technically a liquid wax, very stable, shelf life 2+ years. Turmeric-infused oil: curcumin from Curcuma longa root infused into a stable carrier such as sunflower or jojoba. Vitamin E (d-alpha-tocopherol) at 0.5 to 1% as antioxidant stabiliser.

recipe.yieldDescription: ~50 g face oil (fills a 50 ml amber dropper bottle)
recipe.batchNotes: Scale all oils proportionally. Keep vitamin E at 0.5 to 1% of total batch weight.
recipe.shelfLifeNotes: 6 months in a cool, dark place. Rosehip oil oxidises relatively quickly; vitamin E slows this. Discard if the oil smells rancid.

glossaryTerms.definition: A carrier oil in which plant material has been steeped to extract its compounds. Turmeric-infused oil is made by gently heating turmeric root pieces in a stable carrier oil such as sunflower for several hours, then straining.
A plant-derived oil used as the base of an anhydrous cosmetic blend. Carrier oils dilute more active or concentrated ingredients and make up the bulk of the formula.
Vitamin E oil used at 0.5 to 1% in facial oils as an antioxidant. It slows the oxidation of unsaturated fatty acids in the blend, extending shelf life.

acts as an antioxidant to extend the shelf life of the rosehip oil. No water phase means no preservative is required. The turmeric can leave a brief yellow tint on pale skin; it absorbs fully within 5 to 10 minutes. Apply at night to avoid any temporary staining on fabric.

items.prepNote: 30% of blend; very stable, extends blend shelf life
Turmeric-macerated sunflower or jojoba oil; 19% of blend

content.text: Weigh all oils into the beaker. Stir gently to combine. Transfer to a clean amber dropper bottle. Cap and turn gently a few times to ensure even mixing.
Apply 3 to 5 drops to clean skin in the evening. Press gently into skin rather than rubbing. Allow to absorb for 5 to 10 minutes before contact with fabric. Avoid the eye area.
6 months in a cool, dark place. Keep in an amber or dark glass bottle to protect the rosehip oil from light. Discard if the oil smells rancid or the colour fades significantly.
